/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=armv8.2-a+fp16+dotprod -mtune=cortex-a76 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wshadow -Wnull-dereference -Wformat=2 -Wno-unused-parameter -O3 -ffast-math -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/yolo_inference.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/yolo_inference.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolo_inference.dir/src/neon_preprocess.cpp.o
